title: Forge & Fables [Fabric]
description: Tech meets Pokémon: automate, survive, and catch 'em all!
body:
# THIS DESCRIPTION WILL BE REDONE! THE DESCRIPTION OF THE PACK IS NOT ACCURATE ANYMORE!

# Welcome to the Modpack Page of Catching Creativity!
This modpack built on two core mods; Create and Cobblemon, with additional mods to expand on these mods, as well as other mods that help with exploration, quality of life and more!

## Create
Create is a very interesting and complicated mod. From making a small automated to a giant factory; there's no limitation to the imagination with Create! I've added a lot of Create add-on mods to bring you a fully expanded and amazing Create experience.

## Cobblemon
Cobblemon is a Pokémon inspired mod. Over the last few years they've added a lot of the already existing Pokémon in a very Minecraft-friendly style. This, and the fact that they're awesome people is why I chose to go with Cobblemon. It's also really easy to make your own Custom-Mons and make them work flawlessly within the game! I've even made my own creation for this specific modpack; a Regi-variant inspired by the blocks from Create!

## QoL
You can't have a great modpack with QoL, believe me. This is why I've made sure to include a lot of them; these vary from simple mods like MouseTweaks to help you craft/store items faster, to plugins that help with performance! 

##
### IMPORTANT: Please make sure to check your keybinds to make full use of all the mods! Not all of these will be bound from the start.

##
**This is a rebranding of 'Meyómon'!**

_Good luck on your adventures! - **Jairen**_
